title: Search Property
subtitle: Find and filter properties across zones, wards and assessment stages

stats.filterHint: Click a card to filter results by assessment stage

tooltips.propertyNo: Letters, numbers, hyphen (-), and slash (/). Max 20 characters. Example: P-2023-001, 10/A
tooltips.oldPropertyNo: Letters and numbers only. Max 25 characters.
tooltips.upicId: Letters and numbers only. Max 15 characters.
tooltips.citySurveyNo: Letters, numbers, hyphen (-), and slash (/). Max 20 characters. Example: CSN005A, 12/3
tooltips.subZoneNo: Letters and numbers only. Max 10 characters.
tooltips.plotNo: Letters, numbers, hyphen (-), and slash (/). Max 15 characters.
tooltips.holderName: Alphabets, spaces, and period (.) only. Max 100 characters.
tooltips.occupierName: Alphabets, spaces, and period (.) only. Max 100 characters.
tooltips.shopBuildingName: Letters, numbers, spaces, /, -, and period (.). Max 100 characters.
tooltips.societyName: Letters, numbers, spaces, period (.), and hyphen (-). Max 100 characters.
tooltips.address: Letters, numbers, spaces, comma, period, slash, and hyphen. Max 300 characters.

validation.wardRequiresZone: Please select a zone before selecting a ward.
validation.propertyNoFromRequired: Enter a Property No. 'From' value when using Property No. 'To'.
validation.propertyNoRangeInvalid: Property No. 'To' must be greater than or equal to 'From'.
validation.propertyNoInvalid: Property No. must contain numbers only.
validation.oldPropertyNoInvalid: Old Property No. must contain letters and numbers only.
validation.upicIdInvalid: UPIC ID must contain letters and numbers only.
validation.addressInvalid: Address cannot exceed 500 words, and accepts only letters, numbers, spaces, and , . / - in English, Hindi, or Marathi.
validation.taxDefaulterRangeRequired: Enter both From and To values for the customised tax defaulter filter.
validation.taxDefaulterRangeInvalid: Tax defaulter 'To' value must be greater than or equal to 'From'.
validation.rateableValueBetweenRequired: Enter both amount fields for the rateable value between filter.
validation.capitalValueBetweenRequired: Enter both amount fields for the capital value between filter.
validation.rateableValueInvalid: Rateable Value must contain positive numbers only.
validation.noSearchCriteria: Select at least one filter (Zone, Ward, Property No, UPIC ID, Holder Name, Mobile, etc.) before searching.

results.title: Search Results
results.noResults: No properties match the current filters.
results.applyFilterHint: Apply a filter above or click a stat card to view properties.
results.searchFailed: Search could not be completed. See the error message above.

loading.description: Please wait while we fetch the property data

error.loadFailedTitle: Search Property could not be loaded
error.description: Review the reason above, fix the issue if needed, and try again.
error.connectionFailed: Unable to load search data. Please check your connection and try again.
error.requestFailed: Unable to complete the search request.
error.permissionDenied: You do not have permission to search properties.
error.timeout: The search request timed out. Please try again.
error.searchFailedGeneric: Property search failed. Please review your filters and try again.
